title: Soviet Records
description: The mod adds crafting of some vanilla music records and Soviet records. Added the following music: Soviet March, WarThunder, Best Country in the World
body:
The mod added to the game a set of records with famous Soviet songs, melodies from films and military marches. Records can be played on a turntable. New items: Records (3 pieces)
Each record has a unique title in the spirit of Minecraft and when placed in the player plays the corresponding composition. The mod also allows you to craft all the records added to it on a workbench.
